records.m_Talk_ENG: D-did we get him...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-did we get him...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-did we get him...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think so. The knights have stopped multiplying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think so. The knights have stopped multiplying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think so. The knights have stopped multiplying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a relief. It would've been dangerous if Ciel didn't finish him off quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a relief. It would've been dangerous if Ciel didn't finish him off quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a relief. It would've been dangerous if Ciel didn't finish him off quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The strategy... You figured it out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The strategy... You figured it out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The strategy... You figured it out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is supposed to be a difficult area, but... you did good. Everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is supposed to be a difficult area, but... you did good. Everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is supposed to be a difficult area, but... you did good. Everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he. We couldn't have done it without the help from our seniors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he. We couldn't have done it without the help from our seniors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he. We couldn't have done it without the help from our seniors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle, are you okay? You look a little upset...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle, are you okay? You look a little upset...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle, are you okay? You look a little upset...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't what I wanted! I was supposed to land the finishing blow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't what I wanted! I was supposed to land the finishing blow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't what I wanted! I was supposed to land the finishing blow!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You won... because everyone worked together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You won... because everyone worked together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You won... because everyone worked together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! I didn't need a party! I could've done it alone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! I didn't need a party! I could've done it alone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! I didn't need a party! I could've done it alone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There she goes again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There she goes again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There she goes again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When you say you don't need a party... are you saying you'd fight without any allies...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: When you say you don't need a party... are you saying you'd fight without any allies...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: When you say you don't need a party... are you saying you'd fight without any allies...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's... a very dangerous idea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... a very dangerous idea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... a very dangerous idea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's right. We were only able to beat the black knight because Mika knew how to beat him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's right. We were only able to beat the black knight because Mika knew how to beat him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's right. We were only able to beat the black knight because Mika knew how to beat him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had to deal with grunts when I wanted to take the lead...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had to deal with grunts when I wanted to take the lead...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had to deal with grunts when I wanted to take the lead...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This might be just a simulation, but I do not think you should have that kind of mindset in battle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This might be just a simulation, but I do not think you should have that kind of mindset in battle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This might be just a simulation, but I do not think you should have that kind of mindset in battle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it not better to come up with the most effective method to defeat the enemy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it not better to come up with the most effective method to defeat the enemy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it not better to come up with the most effective method to defeat the enemy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That battle was only possible because everyone worked together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That battle was only possible because everyone worked together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That battle was only possible because everyone worked together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It wouldn't have been possible if I or you, Naielle, were alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It wouldn't have been possible if I or you, Naielle, were alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It wouldn't have been possible if I or you, Naielle, were alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Are you saying that I'm weak?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Are you saying that I'm weak?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Are you saying that I'm weak?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't fight... between friends.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't fight... between friends.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't fight... between friends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Class is dismissed... for today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Class is dismissed... for today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Class is dismissed... for today.
